_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The time span of a day.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The category describes a specific day time span. It may be also used as a container for daily data.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The time span of a week.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The category describes a specific week time span. It may be also used as a container for weekly data.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The time span of a month.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The category describes a specific month time span. It may be also used as a container for monthly data.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The time span of a year.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The category describes a specific year time span. It may be also used as a container for yearly data.
The category describes a time span that represents a range, you should expect both the [start](std_date_start.md) and [end](std_date_end) date of the range.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The data is organised as a geographic grid of values.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: Each *record* contains *data* describing a *single geographic grid tile* covering a region of interest.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The data is aggregated for a geographic shape.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: Each *record* contains *data* describing a *single geographic grid tile* covering a *shape* belonging to a region of interest.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The full region of the project

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The *subject* of each *record* is the *full region* of the project, all records describe the region.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The data is aggregated for the geographic shape of a GCU.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The *subject* of each *record* is the *bounds* of the *GCU*.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: The data is aggregated for the individual polygons of a GCU.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The *subject* of each *record* is the *polygon* belonging to a *GCU*.
